song.title: Sing Alleluia
song.lyrics:
[V1] .Am Em Am Em Sing alleluia to the Lord |(Sing alleluia to the Lord) .Am G E Sing alleluia to the Lord |(Sing alleluia) .Am Em F C Sing alleluia; sing alleluia |(Alleluia) .Am Em Am Sing alleluia to the Lord
[V2] Jesus is King and Lord of all |(Jesus is King and Lord of all) Jesus is King and Lord of all |(King and Lord of all) Jesus is King and Lord; Jesus is King and Lord |(Alleluia) Jesus is King and Lord of all
